title: Meeting records and reports of the Chemicals Management Plan Science Committee - Canada.ca
content:
## Meeting records and reports of the Chemicals Management Plan Science Committee
The Government of Canada takes into consideration committee reports, along with other sources of scientific expertise, in ensuring a strong science foundation to the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).
- Meeting records and reports from the second term of the CMP Science Committee
- Meeting records and reports from the first term of the CMP Science Committee
